title: How to Edit the Alarm Information
description:
How to Edit the Alarm Information

How to Edit the Alarm Information

The configured alarm information can be edited in EPSON RC+ 7.0.

Select EPSON RC+ 7.0 menu-[Tools]-[Maintenance] to display the [Controller Tools] dialog box.

Select the alarm to be changed and click the <Change> button.

Display the [Change Alarm] dialog box and enter any of the following.

Purchase or replacement date of the battery

Date of grease up

Click the <OK> button and change the specified alarm information.
